Name: MISSION_SYS_MSG_ANSWER_PARAM_ST
Description: Determines the parameters for mission reactions.

Fields.Name: Disable Param: Network Test Version
Fields.Description: Exclude from the NT version or mark the ones to be excluded.

Fields.Name: Disable Param: Release Version
Fields.Description: Exclude from the product version or mark the items to be excluded.

Fields.Name: Talk Param ID
Fields.Description: The conversation parameter ID to use.

Fields.Name: Reaction Limit
Fields.Description: The maximum number of instances of this reaction.

Fields.Name: Reaction Group ID
Fields.Description: The group ID to use for the reaction limit.
